title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Compare the two photographs and answer the question. You have about one minute.

tasks.instructions: Compare the two photographs and say what the advantages and disadvantages of public transport might be and how people's experiences of it differ.

images.label: A
images.description: A packed underground train during rush hour, passengers standing shoulder to shoulder and holding overhead rails, looking tired and impatient

images.label: B
images.description: A modern light rail tram gliding smoothly through a city street, passengers seated comfortably looking out of wide panoramic windows

followUp.question: What improvements do you think are most urgently needed in public transport systems in your country?

tasks.instructions: Compare the two photographs and say what the advantages and disadvantages of cars and cycling are for urban residents and the city environment.

images.label: D
images.description: A long traffic jam on a city motorway, cars bumper to bumper with exhaust fumes visible in the air and frustrated drivers visible through windscreens

images.label: E
images.description: A busy cycling lane in Amsterdam, full of commuters of all ages cycling confidently alongside each other, separate from car traffic

followUp.question: Do you think cities should do more to discourage car use? What measures might be effective?
